purpose: Resolve citation keys used in Lean docstrings and project docs, and let a reader (or their agent) verify every cited claim against the exact source version.

conventions.key_style: LaTeX alpha style: author initials (von prefixes lowercase) + 2-digit year; 5+ authors abbreviate to the first three initials + '+'.
conventions.verification: Every entry is TeX-verifiable: download https://arxiv.org/e-print/<arxiv_id><arxiv_version>, extract the TeX source, and read the cited file at the cited line. Line numbers are only meaningful for the pinned arxiv_version.
conventions.policy: Only sources with public TeX are registered here. Works without TeX sources (books, pre-arXiv papers) are credited in prose (author, year) and never used as verification anchors.

entries.title: Lecture Notes on Quantum Algorithms for Scientific Computation
Stabilisation of Quantum Computations by Symmetrisation
Quantum singular value transformation and beyond: exponential improvements for quantum matrix arithmetics
Power and limitations of single-qubit native quantum neural networks
